github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits format. Allowed types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore, perf, build, ci, revert.
The 'scope' is MANDATORY. Format: type(scope): description. Scope must be lower-case or kebab-case.
The 'subject' must NOT use sentence-case, Start-Case, PascalCase, or UPPERCASE. Keep it all lowercase.
The 'subject' must NOT end with a period (.).
Use the imperative, present tense: 'change' not 'changed' or 'changes'.
